body: Wired the new tungsten_watchdog.ps1 (Manuel-supplied, at stoic wealth folder) into tungsten-attach-and-watch.ps1: it now auto-starts as a detached background process at Step 0 (before any chart/launch), reused across relaunches via a PID file, sharing -SessionId with attach-and-watch so both logs reconcile. The in-loop death alert now points at the watchdog's dedicated log for forensics instead of duplicating them. Both scripts parser-validated clean. NOT yet live-tested against a real terminal launch -- next live run is the real test, and it directly targets the still-open Terminal-closing root cause from the Keys 3 investigation.
